replies.msg: Say the following to your girlfriend: You're gorgeous, cute and pretty. You're the best thing that has ever happened to me. Your live is what keeps me going every day. It's awesome to spend my life with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you as you slept. The angel returned to me and when I asked why? The angel said that angels do not watch over angels. This afternoon I went to the hospital and got an x-ray, do you know what they found? You in my heart. The doctor said that my heart will always be fine with you in it.
試下囉 唔通認命咩

quote.msg: Say the following to your girlfriend: You're gorgeous, cute and pretty. You're the best thing that has ever happened to me. Your live is what keeps me going every day. It's awesome to spend my life with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you as you slept. The angel returned to me and when I asked why? The angel said that angels do not watch over angels. This afternoon I went to the hospital and got an x-ray, do you know what they found? You in my heart. The doctor said that my heart will always be fine with you in it.
